title: 极点传媒logo黄色边缘精确修复
instructions:
Check and fix yellow/orange fringe pixels around the gold ring in the logo images.

Source images:
- C:\Users\linkang\.openclaw\media\inbound\dab95091-e150-45d6-84d6-f9d8fb2da2af.jpg
- C:\Users\linkang\.openclaw\media\inbound\77b250f9-eb36-409f-be72-39a2b847f3cf.jpg

Already generated files to check (C:\ADHD_agent\openclaw\workspace\uploads\):
- jidian_100pct_v1.png through jidian_40pct_v2.png

Task:
1. Read each file with Python PIL/numpy
2. Find ALL pixels where ANY RGB channel > 0 (non-black pixels)
3. Report: for each file, list coordinates (x,y) and RGB values of any stray non-foreground pixels (pixels that are NOT part of the white star, gold ring, or white Chinese text)
4. If stray pixels found: reprocess from source images using the correct method
5. Save fixed files to C:\ADHD_agent\openclaw\workspace\uploads\

Correct processing method:
- Fill bottom-right decorative star region (x=940-1024, y=940-1024) with pure black (0,0,0)
- Extract foreground using luminance threshold > 80 (background ~60-76, gold ring >300, white star >600)
- Scale icon to 100%/80%/60%/40%, keep text at original size (564px wide)
- Composite onto pure black 1024x1024 canvas

Report all findings and saved files.
